business.summary: ITC Hotels announced robust fourth-quarter earnings for FY26. Profit after tax surged 23% year-on-year. Revenue from operations also saw a significant 14% increase. The company's hospitality business demonstrated continued growth. For the full fiscal year, profit after tax rose 29%. A final dividend of Rs 1 per equity share has been recommended.

business.title: Nifty to hit 42,000 by 2028? New paper that studied market cycles says it's possible if these factors align
business.summary: A CNI InfoXchange study projects the Nifty could surpass 42,000 by 2028 if sustained foreign investor inflows return. The report highlights stronger domestic liquidity, resilient equity markets, robust GDP growth prospects, rising retail participation, and India’s increasing weight in global emerging market indices.

business.title: Hindustan Copper Q4 Results: Cons PAT surges 135% YoY to Rs 444 crore, revenue jumps 58%
business.summary: Hindustan Copper Q4 Results: Hindustan Copper reported a significant 134% surge in consolidated net profit to Rs 444 crore for the March-ended quarter, driven by a 58% revenue increase to Rs 1,156 crore. The company also recommended a dividend of Rs 1.86 per share for FY26. Full-year PAT grew 97% to Rs 921 crore.

business.title: Bloodbath on K-Street! South Korea's Kospi crashes 6% after world-beating rally to 8,000
business.summary: South Korea’s Kospi saw a violent reversal after briefly topping 8,000, crashing over 6% as tech stocks plunged and foreign investors dumped shares. Samsung Electronics’ steep fall amid an 18-day strike call intensified the rout, wiping out much of the index’s world-beating 2026 gains and dragging broader Asian markets lower.

business.title: Lighthouse Canton launches Rs 1,200 cr private credit fund to tap India’s evolving lending landscape
business.summary: Lighthouse Canton has launched its third India-focused private credit fund, targeting Rs 1,200 crore to capitalise on the country’s expanding private credit market. The fund will focus on structured credit investments in mid-to-large corporates, aiming to deliver stable yields and risk-adjusted returns through secured lending strategies.
